query:
SELECT pp.id, pp.processoId, pp.nome, pp.tipo, pp.cpfCnpj,
       p.numeroCnj, c.nomeCompleto as clienteNome
FROM partesProcessuais pp
LEFT JOIN processos p ON pp.processoId = p.id
LEFT JOIN clientes c ON p.clienteId = c.id
ORDER BY pp.processoId, pp.tipo
LIMIT 30
